svg.title: Sheet Music for "Shetland Set"

text.tspan: da Ferry Reel, Lay Dee at Dee, and Miss Spencie's Reel
Source: See, e.g. Aly Bain and Tom Anderson, "The Silver Bow: The Fiddle Music of Shetland"
(2016). The same set is played by Jennifer Wrigley.
Notes: Some Shetland reels. I was originally going to list these separately, but they seem often to
